name: Rocketry (Modern Python Scheduler)

agent_readiness.notes: Modern Python task scheduling framework. Expressive string conditions: @app.task('every 1 hour', 'time of day between 08 and 16'). Async support. Multiple execution modes (thread, process, async). Condition expressions. Built-in parameter dependency injection. Persistent session state. Logging. More expressive than APScheduler, simpler than Airflow for in-process scheduling. Best for embedding scheduling in Python applications.

gotchas: Newer project — less battle-tested in production
best_when: In-process Python application scheduling with expressive conditions
avoid_when: Distributed scheduling across machines (use Celery Beat)
summary: Rocketry is a modern Python task scheduling framework with expressive condition strings. Async-native. Dependency injection. Persistent session state. More expressive than APScheduler with conditions like 'every 1 hour', 'time of day between 08 and 16'. Best for in-process application scheduling where you want a modern, async-friendly alternative to APScheduler.
